title: Fans Predict Third Trailer Release Date Based on Take-Two Earnings Call
summary: Players are speculating that the third GTA 6 trailer could arrive on August 7, 2026, following Take-Two's announcement of a changed earnings call schedule. The date has sparked widespread discussion among fans eager to see the first official gameplay footage before the November 19 release.

title: Rockstar Could Face $35 Million Fine Over Australian ID Verification Laws
summary: Australian players may need to verify their age with identification before playing GTA 6 due to new online safety legislation requiring checks for R18+ content. Rockstar faces potential fines up to $49.5 million Australian dollars per breach if the studio fails to comply with the verification requirements.

title: PlayStation Plus Boycott Won't Impact GTA 6 Launch Plans
summary: Industry analysts say the ongoing PlayStation Plus subscription boycott will have minimal effect on the digital-only GTA 6 launch scheduled for November 19. The protest noise is considered too small to influence either Sony's strategy or Rockstar's discless release approach.

title: Rockstar Developers Threaten Strike Action Amid Crunch Period
summary: Developers at Rockstar's UK studios are moving forward with unionization efforts and potential strike action during the game's final development crunch before November launch. The union seeks protections on overtime, pay transparency, and flexible working, with concerns that a strike could delay the release or impact game quality.

title: No Physical Disc Version Confirmed Despite Retailer Email Confusion
summary: The Hollywood Reporter confirmed that GTA 6 will not receive physical disc copies at launch or in subsequent months, despite a confusing Rockstar support email that led fans to believe otherwise. The game will remain digital-only with code-in-box versions available at retail.
